rationale: No direct conflict. §48.122 establishes a per-student literacy allotment funded by appropriation, not by local property tax revenue. Homestead exemption changes affect school district recapture calculations under Ch. 41, not this allotment's statutory amount or eligibility.
quote: a school district is entitled to an annual allotment of $250, or a greater amount provided by appropriation
_note: Indirect fiscal pressure on state budget may exist but no statutory text conflict present.
